Why not finish removing the last CFS hash callers instead?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> Why not finish removing the last CFS hash callers instead?

I was hoping to finish off the libcfs cleanup which is a much quicker project.

Patch Set 2:

Especially since the ldlm rhashtable port is on hold until all the RHEL8 debug kernel issues are resolved.

parents.subject: LU-18211 build: add e2fsprogs-devel to dkms dependency

commit.subject: LU-9859 libcfs: migrate hash table to obdclass
commit.message:
LU-9859 libcfs: migrate hash table to obdclass

The lustre specific hash is only used by the Lustre layer so it
doesn't make sense to keep it in libcfs. Move the hash code to
obdclass. Once ldlm resource hashtable moves to rhashtabble this
be server only code.

Test-Parameters: trivial
